summary: Completed comprehensive backend API testing (22 tests, 100% pass rate) and frontend UI testing. All core features working correctly including auth, configurable interviews, abort/delete endpoints, dashboard stats, and 4-step RoleSetup wizard.

backend: Login with valid credentials (200) - returns token
POST /api/interviews/start with configurable num_questions and time_per_question (200)
GET /api/profile - get user profile with stats (200)
frontend: Landing page loads with hero, features, CTAs
Login page with email/password form and Google login option
Login flow with test@test.com / test123 redirects to dashboard
Dashboard shows 4 stat cards (Total, Completed, In Progress, Questions Answered)
Dashboard 'Questions Answered' calculated from actual data (not hardcoded)
Dashboard shows Role-Based and Resume-Based interview options
Dashboard recent interviews with dropdown menus
RoleSetup 4-step wizard: Step 2 Experience Level selection
RoleSetup 4-step wizard: Step 3 Skills selection (2-8 skills)
RoleSetup 4-step wizard: Step 4 Configure (num questions + time per question)
RoleSetup summary preview shows all selections
InterviewHistory dropdown menu: Abort (for in-progress), Delete
InterviewReview page with Performance Summary (markdown stripped)
InterviewReview 'Send to Email' button shows toast (MOCKED - UI only)
LiveInterview page with question card, video preview, controls

seed_data_creation: Created completed interview int_3c3ecc23bd34 with 3 responses for testing review page
context_for_next_testing_agent: All major features tested and working. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_interview_platform.py cover auth, interviews CRUD, abort, configurable settings, recordings, and profile endpoints. Frontend tested via Playwright for login flow, dashboard stats, RoleSetup wizard, history page with dropdowns, and interview review page. 'Send Feedback to Email' is MOCKED (shows toast only, no real email sent) - this is intentional per requirements.

mocked_apis.Send Feedback to Email: UI-only placeholder, shows toast confirmation, no backend email service

features_verified.clean_ai_output: stripMarkdown function applied on both backend and frontend - verified no **, ##, * symbols
features_verified.video_player_review: video element with preload=auto present on review page
features_verified.delete_abort_buttons: Working on Dashboard and InterviewHistory pages
features_verified.timer_auto_stop: Code reviewed - timer uses ref pattern with auto-submit callback
features_verified.manual_stop_submit: Stop & Submit button implemented with data-testid='stop-recording-btn'
features_verified.questions_answered_stat: Calculated as sum of responses.length across all interviews (not hardcoded)
